title: prostanthera stricta
intro: Prostanthera stricta, also known as the Victorian mint bush, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Western Australia for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to aid digestion and relieve headaches. The leaves of the Prostanthera stricta plant contain essential oils with analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, providing health benefits such as reduced pain and inflammation. Prostanthera stricta can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, allowing for various forms of use in traditional medicine.
